mapper.select: select id, doc_id, action, comment, operator_user_id, operator_name, created_at from km_review_record where id = #{id}
select id, doc_id, action, comment, operator_user_id, operator_name, created_at from km_review_record where doc_id = #{docId} order by created_at desc
select id, doc_id, action, comment, operator_user_id, operator_name, created_at from km_review_record where doc_id = #{docId} order by created_at desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into km_review_record (doc_id, action, comment, operator_user_id, operator_name, created_at) values (#{docId}, #{action}, #{comment}, coalesce(#{operatorUserId}, 0), #{operatorName}, #{createdAt})
